rolesPageDescription: Manage system and custom roles from the second real admin screen connected to the platform shell.
rolesListSubtitle: Management roles, system roles and descriptions are listed here.
createRoleSubtitle: Standard form card for new role definitions.
name: Name
noRolesDescription: Start by creating a new role.
permissionsPageDescription: Manage user, T-Code and action based permissions from one standard screen.
permissionsListSubtitle: Use filters to inspect current permissions by user and page.
upsertPermissionSubtitle: Set allow or deny decision from the same card.
decisionHelp: When enabled the action is allowed, otherwise a deny record is stored.
noPermissionsDescription: Change filters or save a new permission.
